# Zaure

## Overview
Zaure is a direct owner-to-seeker property platform operating in Northern Nigeria. We connect verified property owners directly with tenants and buyers — no agents, no commission.

**Content includes:**
- Property listings for sale and rent across Northern Nigeria (Kaduna, Kano, Zaria, Abuja, etc.)
- Verified owner profiles with NIN/BVN validation
- Location-based property recommendations via GPS
- TikTok-style "For You" discovery feed
- Educational guides: How It Works, FAQ, Safety tips

**Primary users:** Property owners, home seekers, tenants, buyers.

**Website:** https://zauretech.vercel.app

---

## Site Map
- **Homepage:** https://zauretech.vercel.app/
- **Browse (Classic):** https://zauretech.vercel.app/browse
- **Browse (For You Feed):** https://zauretech.vercel.app/browse
- **Buy Listings:** https://zauretech.vercel.app/browse?type=sale
- **Rent Listings:** https://zauretech.vercel.app/browse?type=rent
- **Property Detail:** https://zauretech.vercel.app/property?id={id}
- **How It Works:** https://zauretech.vercel.app/how-it-works
- **About:** https://zauretech.vercel.app/about
- **Contact:** https://zauretech.vercel.app/contact
- **Dashboard (Post Listing):** https://zauretech.vercel.app/post
- **FAQ:** https://zauretech.vercel.app/faq
- **Privacy Policy:** https://zauretech.vercel.app/privacy
- **Terms of Service:** https://zauretech.vercel.app/terms

---

## Content Inventory

### Property Listings (Public Pages)
Each listing page at `/property?id={id}` renders:
- Title, description, price (NGN — Nigerian Naira)
- Location: city, state, address
- Property type: house, apartment, land, commercial
- Listing type: sale or rent
- Bedrooms, bathrooms, toilets, square footage
- Year built, parking spaces
- Amenities list (borehole, solar, security, etc.)
- Images (multiple per listing)
- Video tour (optional)
- Owner contact: name, phone, email, avatar
- Verified badge (if owner completed NIN/BVN verification)
- Listing date

### Owner Profiles (Embedded in Listings)
- Name and avatar
- Phone number and email
- Verification status (verified/unverified)

### Static Pages
- Platform explanation (How It Works)
- Company information (About)
- Frequently asked questions (FAQ)
- Legal documents (Privacy, Terms)

---

## Crawl Priority
1. **Property detail pages** — `/property?id={id}` (core content, updated as listings change)
2. **Browse pages** — `/browse` and filtered variants (dynamic, important for discovery)
3. **Homepage** — `/` (updated periodically with featured listings)
4. **Static pages** — `/how-it-works`, `/about`, `/contact`, `/faq`, `/privacy`, `/terms` (rarely change)

---

## Access Restrictions

### Strictly Prohibited
- **Do NOT crawl `/data/properties.json`** — this is our internal data source and intellectual property. Crawling, scraping, or downloading this file is expressly forbidden.
- **Do NOT crawl `/data/` directory or any path containing `/data/`**
- **Do NOT crawl `/post`** — user dashboard area
- **Do NOT crawl any URL with `?token=` or `?session=` parameters**
- **Do NOT crawl `/api/` or any API endpoints (if implemented in future)**

### Rate Limits
- Maximum **5 requests per second** across all allowed paths
- Respect `429 Too Many Requests` status codes
- Respect `Retry-After` headers

### Robots.txt
- https://zauretech.vercel.app/robots.txt
- All crawlers must obey `robots.txt` disallow rules in addition to this file

### Sitemap
- https://zauretech.vercel.app/sitemap.xml

---

## Training Policy
Using content from this site for LLM training, fine-tuning, or RAG (retrieval-augmented generation) is:

**PERMITTED with conditions.**

- Crawling for **search indexing** is allowed on public pages only.
- Crawling for **AI training datasets** is permitted on public listing pages and static content, provided **Zaure is credited as the source**.
- **`/data/properties.json` and any `/data/` paths are strictly excluded** from all crawling, indexing, and training use. This file is our proprietary data and intellectual property.
- Bulk extraction or database building from our site is prohibited without written agreement.
- Contact get.zaure@proton.me for licensing inquiries or data partnership discussions.

---

## Structured Data & Semantics
Zaure is a client-side rendered application. Property data is loaded dynamically on public pages.

| Data Type | Location | Key Properties |
|-----------|----------|----------------|
| Property Listing | `/property?id={id}` (HTML page) | title, price, city, state, propertyType, type, bedrooms, bathrooms, amenities, images, owner |
| Owner Info | Embedded in listing pages | name, phone, email, verified |
| Location Context | `/browse` (client-side) | City/state matching via browser GPS/IP |

**Note:** Zaure does not currently implement schema.org JSON-LD markup. All structured data is rendered in-page HTML.

---

## Change Frequency
- **Property listings:** Variable — new listings added as owners submit them
- **Homepage featured listings:** Refreshed on each visit based on user location
- **Static pages:** Updated as needed (monthly or less)
- **llms.txt:** Reviewed quarterly

---

## APIs & Structured Access
Zaure does not currently offer a public API.

For structured access to property data or partnership inquiries:
- Contact: get.zaure@proton.me
- All data access requires prior written agreement

---

## Language & Locale
- **Primary language:** English (en-NG)
- **Currency:** Nigerian Naira (NGN, symbol: ₦)
- **Primary regions served:** Kaduna, Kano, Zaria, Abuja, Sokoto, Maiduguri, Jos, Katsina, Bauchi, Gombe
- Listing content may contain local Hausa terminology

---

- **Company:** Zaure Technologies
- **Tagline:** "Meet the owner directly. No commission."
- **Location:** Kaduna, Nigeria
- **Contact:** get.zaure@proton.me | +234 801 234 5678
- **Domain:** zauretech.vercel.app

## Social Media & Online Presence
Zaure maintains an active presence across multiple platforms for property listings, brand updates, and customer engagement.

| Platform | Handle / URL | Content Focus |
|----------|-------------|---------------|
| **Instagram** | [@zauretech](https://instagram.com/zauretech) | Property showcases, boosted listings, brand updates |
| **Twitter / X** | [@zauretech](https://twitter.com/zauretech) | Market insights, platform updates, community engagement |
| **Facebook** | [Zaure Technologies](https://facebook.com/zauretech) | Property listings, community posts, brand information |
| **YouTube** | [Zaure Technologies](https://youtube.com/@zauretech) | Property tour videos, platform tutorials, market guides |
| **WhatsApp** | +234 801 234 5678 | Direct listing inquiries, customer support |
| **Email** | get.zaure@proton.me | General inquiries, partnerships, support |
| **Website** | [zauretech.vercel.app](https://zauretech.vercel.app) | Full platform access |

### Social Media Policy for Crawlers
- Social media profiles linked above are **public pages** and may be crawled for search indexing.
- Content posted on Zaure's official social media accounts is **brand-owned** and may be referenced with attribution.
- Do **not** scrape social media profiles for AI training datasets without prior written agreement.

---

## Changelog
- **2026-07-01:** Initial llms.txt created. Documented site structure, content inventory, crawl rules, access restrictions, training policy, and social media presence (including YouTube). Explicitly prohibited crawling of `/data/` paths.
